description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this brown shoulder bag from murcia will come in handy. Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall, multiplex or even college. The bag is large enough to accommodate your essentials, plus it's so attractive that you will get appreciative glances all day long.Made of synthetic leather for enhanced durability and styleTwo roomy zippered compartments with a small zippered pouch in one compartment, and one zippered compartment at the backTwo padded short handles for ease of carrying and extra comfortMetal loops to hold the handles with for added styleBuckle detailing on either side for styleBranded zippers and sliders for easy use and durabilityBag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a mild leather cleaner
